buildCommand: npx prisma generate --schema=database/prisma/schema.prisma && (test -n "$DATABASE_URL" && npx prisma db push --schema=database/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss && ADMIN_INITIAL_PASSWORD="$ADMIN_INITIAL_PASSWORD" npx tsx database/seed/index.ts || true) && npm run build --workspace=@mge/web
